# fleetdm_fleet_maintained_apps (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about all Fleet Maintained Apps.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all Fleet Maintained Apps
data "fleetdm_fleet_maintained_apps" "all" {}

# Get Fleet Maintained Apps with team context
data "fleetdm_fleet_maintained_apps" "for_team" {
  team_id = 5
}

# Output all app names
output "all_app_names" {
  value = [for app in data.fleetdm_fleet_maintained_apps.all.fleet_maintained_apps : app.name]
}

# Find apps already added to the team
output "apps_added_to_team" {
  value = [for app in data.fleetdm_fleet_maintained_apps.for_team.fleet_maintained_apps : app.name if app.software_title_id != null]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `team_id` (Number) Filter/annotate by team. If specified, software_title_id will be populated for apps already added to the team.

### Read-Only

- `fleet_maintained_apps` (Attributes List) List of all Fleet Maintained Apps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fleet_maintained_apps))

<a id="nestedatt--fleet_maintained_apps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fleet_maintained_apps`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) The Fleet Maintained App ID.
- `name` (String) The app name.
- `platform` (String) The platform (darwin, windows, linux).
- `slug` (String) The app slug.
- `software_title_id` (Number) Set if the app is already added to the team.
- `version` (String) The latest version.
